_comment: Launch content bank P1-P15, re-dated from 2026-06-11 (T-14). Copy is corrected for the payments-OFF early-access beta: no prices, no 'first session free', no recording/student-camera claims. {{link}} is replaced by the script with the locale-specific register URL carrying UTM parameters. 'gated: true' posts are NOT auto-scheduled — they are released manually on launch day only after the platform is confirmed healthy.

posts.visual: Brand hero card: logo + 'Early Access - June 25' badge (1080x1080 + 1200x627)

content.en:
Something new is coming for curious minds. 🚀

Schulab — interactive STEM learning with live tutors, for ages 3–18, in English · Deutsch · العربية.

Early access opens June 25 — and it's free during early access.

Join now → {{link}}

#EdTech #STEM #Lernplattform #تعليم #OnlineLearning

content.en:
What if STEM actually felt like play? 👀

A peek inside Schulab's interactive lessons — slides, quizzes, badges, certificates.

Free during early access. Doors open June 25 — link in bio.

#STEMeducation #learnontiktok #EdTech #interactivelearning

posts.visual: Split before/after carousel: worksheet vs interactive lesson + live session

content.en:
Worksheets are boring. 😴

Schulab blends interactive lessons + live sessions with real STEM tutors + certificates your child can be proud of — in 3 languages. 🌍

Free during early access, starting June 25 → {{link}}

#parenting #STEM #homeschool #EdTech

posts.visual: Founder photo or product collage, clean text card

content.en:
We're building Schulab to make world-class STEM learning accessible, multilingual, and genuinely interactive — with live tutors at its core.

For learners aged 3–18, in English, German, and Arabic. Early access opens June 25, free while we grow with our first families.

Educators and schools: we'd love to talk. {{link}}

#EdTech #STEM #startup #education

posts.visual: Bold 'FREE during early access' card, trilingual variants, brand gradient

content.en:
🎁 Schulab is FREE during early access.

Full access to interactive STEM courses, live tutor sessions, badges and certificates — for ages 3–18, in English · Deutsch · العربية.
